response.justification: Strong fullstack background with 15+ years of experience spanning TypeScript/Node.js, React, and multiple languages including Java. Recent role at re:cinq directly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, matching a key requirement. Demonstrated craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and architecture experience align well with the senior IC role, though current career gap and lack of explicit Nest.js/Vitest/Kotlin experience are minor gaps.
strengths: 15+ years fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB matching the primary stack
Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
Strong software craftsmanship background: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and active community teaching
concerns: No explicit Nest.js, Vitest, or Kotlin experience listed despite being primary/secondary stack requirements
Currently on a career gap (caregiving) since October 2025, availability uncertain
Limited recent cloud/Kubernetes depth shown; AWS CDK mentioned but no GCP/Azure or strong container orchestration evidence
